text: When zoomed in, the modals may overflow the visible viewport. They should scroll then

status.comment: Fixed modal overflow when browser is zoomed in. Applied max-height: 90vh to all modals with flexbox layout for proper scrolling. Updated: PhaseCreationModal, AimCreationModal, AimSearchModal, PhaseSearchModal, ProjectSettingsModal. Added display: flex, flex-direction: column to modal containers, flex: 1 + overflow-y: auto to modal-body sections, and flex-shrink: 0 to headers/footers. ConsistencyModal already had correct pattern (max-height: 85vh). All modals now properly scroll their content when zoomed in or on small viewports.
